ddls:
CREATE TABLE "player_progression" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Name of the grade or rank (e.g., US+2 50) */,
  "exp_required" INTEGER /* Experience required to achieve this grade */,
  "exp_cumulative" INTEGER /* Cumulative experience points up to this grade */,
  "mini_us" INTEGER /* Mini achievement points in category US */,
  "mini_s3" INTEGER /* Mini achievement points in category S3 */,
  "mini_s2" INTEGER /* Mini achievement points in category S2 */,
  "mini_s" INTEGER /* Mini achievement points in general */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with this grade */,
  "rank_icon" TEXT /* URL or path to the icon representing the rank */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the grade was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the grade was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_progression_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the system */,
  "current_grade_id" INTEGER /* Current grade ID of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the player */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_current_grade_id FOREIGN KEY ("current_grade_id") REFERENCES player_progression ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mini_achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mini achievement */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the mini achievement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mini achievement */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with the achievement */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points value of the achievement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mini_achievements_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_achievements" (
  "player_achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player achievement record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who earned the achievement */,
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the achievement earned */,
  "date_earned" TEXT /* Date when the achievement was earned */,
  "achievement_points" INTEGER /* Points earned from the achievement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_achievements_achievement_id FOREIGN KEY ("achievement_id") REFERENCES mini_achievements ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_achievements_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer of the game */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player game stat record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "total_play_time" REAL /* Total play time in hours */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played by the player */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins by the player */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses by the player */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score per game */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score achieved in a game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, player, moderator) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the user accessed the system */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user at the time of access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the user accessed the system */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
